text:
I just can't seem to get the sound going. I'm going to have to write to the folks at alsa for a shell script that works for my machine. Currently they only know of windows and linux.... 

Still working on the problem....give me a year or two....I'll get it....Haven't tried getting the video working yet....

Fix: 

Haven't yet found a fix for it.... Trying > Requesting a script from Alsa project for the AMD64 and bsd 6.2....
How-To-Repeat: Turn the darn thing on... No Sound...
